purpose: Stylesheet for the IDE editor surface: .editor-tabs-bar (36px tab strip, horizontal scroll with hidden scrollbar) and individual .editor-tab elements with active state, accent top-border on active, dirty-state dot, close button. Styles the tab UI surrounding Monaco; Monaco itself is themed via JS (vs-dark + custom palette in monacoWorkerSetup).
gotchas: .editor-tab and .editor-tabs-bar are generic class names — guard against future collisions with other 'tab' UIs.
Active tab top-border accent is via ::before pseudo — overflow-hidden on parent will clip it.
Hidden scrollbar via scrollbar-width:none + ::-webkit hide — horizontal overflow is silent.
patterns: Tab top-accent via pseudo-element rather than border-top to avoid layout shift.
Focus-visible outline-offset: -2px to inset focus ring.
